# 10idea Skills Guide

## Skill Catalog Source
- Canonical catalog: `.agents/skills`
- Load relevant SKILL.md files before applying a skill.

## Recommended Skills for @10idea
- project-planner
- doc-scanner
- review-verification-protocol
- make-repo-contribution
- agent-customization
- tool-discovery
- review

## Usage Notes
- Prefer repository-local skills before external research.
- Use read-only exploration first; only then perform merge/archive edits.
- For high-volume intake, prefer deterministic score/queue updates over ad-hoc prose.
